About.title: About monopolyfun
About.description: monopolyfun puts publishing, claiming, delivery, acceptance, payments, and Virtual Share incentives into one collaboration workspace.
capabilities: Marketplace: discover offers, requests, projects, and trustworthy public profiles.
Publishing: create offers, requests, projects, and claimable project tasks.
Order fulfillment: move delivery through claiming, progress, proof, acceptance, disputes, and closure.
Profile: maintain display details, verification entry points, verification marks, Virtual Share ledger, and locked records.
Backoffice: scan audit, risk, payments, and uploaded assets, then drill into exceptions.

version.title: Current version
version.description: The current version prioritizes browsing, publishing, claiming, delivering, accepting, and backoffice review around real server state. Legacy capabilities that are not connected yet are hidden, disabled, or explained as unavailable.

direction.title: Product direction
direction.description: Transactions, projects, profile data, and organization permissions sit in one compact workspace so publishers, workers, reviewers, and operators collaborate around the same state.

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.description: This is productized terms information for the current version, intended to help users understand service scope, account responsibilities, transaction and delivery rules, and usage risks; the operating entity still needs formal legal text before launch.

sections.heading: Service scope
items: monopolyfun currently provides marketplace publishing, project tasks, order collaboration, payment sessions, delivery uploads, public profiles, Virtual Share ledger records, and backoffice review capabilities.
Page entry points follow currently implemented server capabilities; unavailable capabilities may be hidden, disabled, or marked as not available.
The platform may adjust pages, APIs, permissions, and available features as backend capabilities and product strategy evolve.

sections.heading: Account responsibilities
items: You are responsible for protecting your account, password, sessions, and external verification grants.
Content, delivery evidence, payment information, and profile details you submit should be accurate, lawful, and authorized for use.
If your account is used abnormally, sign out promptly and contact the platform operator.

sections.heading: Transactions and delivery
items: Offers, requests, and project tasks are entered by publishers or participants, and pages display server records.
Order status, acceptance, disputes, closure, payments, and Virtual Share release are determined by the final server-side result.
When payment, upload, or external verification services are not configured, pages show a clear error or unavailable state.

sections.heading: Restrictions and risks
items: Do not publish illegal, infringing, fraudulent, manipulative, system-attacking, or permission-bypassing content or actions.
The current version may still experience feature changes, API adjustments, data model upgrades, and third-party service outages.
Backoffice permissions, risk controls, audits, and manual operations may affect the final state of some orders or assets.

note.title: Pre-launch note
note.description: This page is product information and not a formal legal agreement or legal advice. Before launch, the operating entity should add dispute resolution, liability limits, refund policy, governing law, and contact details.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.description: This is current-version data handling information, intended to help users understand how account, marketplace, order, payment, upload, and profile data is used; formal compliance text is still needed before launch.

sections.heading: Information we process
items: Account information: username, display name, avatar URL, sign-in state, and required verification information.
Transaction information: offers, requests, projects, orders, payment records, delivery evidence, progress records, and dispute handling records.
Profile information: external accounts you bind or verify, display skins, verification marks, and public profile data.
Technical information: request times, API paths, error codes, trace IDs, and necessary device or browser logs.

sections.heading: How information is used
items: To support core functions such as sign-in, publishing, claiming, payments, uploads, acceptance, disputes, and backoffice review.
To display public marketplace content, public account summaries, project Virtual Share ledger records, and organization roles.
To debug issues, prevent abuse, evaluate permissions, audit activity, and run safety controls.

sections.heading: Public display
items: Offers, requests, projects, and parts of your account profile may be displayed as marketplace content.
Orders, payments, uploads, and backoffice review data are shown only to relevant participants or accounts with permission.
If a backend capability is not available yet, the frontend hides the entry point or shows an unavailable state.

sections.heading: Your choices
items: You can update your display name, bio, avatar URL, and display skin in Profile.
You can sign out and clear local session state in the current browser.
Full deletion of server-side data requires backend account and data deletion support.

note.title: Pre-launch note
note.description: This page is product information and not a formal privacy policy or legal advice. Before launch, the operating entity should add company information, contact details, data retention periods, cross-border transfer details, and compliance terms.
